channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Without being there, Apple hits Mobile World Congress
item.description: If you overlook the introduction of the iPhone 16e with its own Apple-designed 5G modem along with the release of new iPads, Macs and processors, you might argue that Apple didn’t make an impression at this year’s Mobile World Congress.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: SolarWinds buys Squadcast to speed incident response
item.description: Observability provider SolarWinds announced this week it had signed an agreement to acquire San Francisco-based Squadcast and its incident response technology for an undisclosed amount.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelley was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Employee screening data breach exposes 3.3 million records
item.description: Major employee screening company data breach affects 3.3 million people. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains what happened and gives five ways to protect your data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Improving intelligent document processing with generative AI
item.description: One of the earliest digital transformation drivers was digitalization, in which organizations converted paper-based processes to digitized workflows. In ideal circumstances, paper documents became web or mobile forms, and workflows replaced handoffs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The 2025 Terminator? Lab-grown muscle brings biohybrid robot hand to life
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about how lab-grown muscles power a biohybrid hand for scalable prosthetics and research.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Enabling this phone setting reduces anxiety, Gen Z says
item.description: It can create "a buffer against unwanted communications and potential social pressures," a psychotherapist said.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Extra cash with no catch? Spotting retiree job scams
item.description: Reports of task scams have significantly risen in the past four years, according to the Federal Trade Commission. Kurt the CyberGuy offers some red flags.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
